title: Panzer Dragoon Saga
prompt: Original pixel art illustration inspired by a 32-bit desert dragon-rider RPG. A lone rider on a blue armored dragon glides above ancient canyon ruins under a vast sunset sky, with ruined towers and dunes stretching into the distance. Visual focus: one rider and dragon silhouette, one ruin landmark, readable in 1 second. Style: premium Saturn-era pixel art, rich sunset palette, strong atmospheric depth, crisp sprite shading, no blur. Mood: lonely, mythic, expansive. Composition: dragon and rider in foreground flight, ruins below, open sky behind, no clutter. Important: do not replicate official Panzer Dragoon designs, logos, or box art. Must feel original but clearly evoke desert dragon fantasy.
negative_prompt: official Panzer Dragoon dragon design, logo, text, exact rider costume, realistic painting, 3D render
